201.description: Transaction has been received by core and is in pending status.

error_result_xdr.description: TransactionResult XDR string which is present only if the submission status from core is an ERROR.

400.description: Transaction is malformed; ERROR status from core.

error_result_xdr.description: TransactionResult XDR string which is present only if the submission status from core is an ERROR.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

status.description: The HTTP status code for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

extras.description: Additional details that might help the client understand the error(s) that occurred.

value.title: Transaction Malformed
value.detail: Horizon could not decode the transaction envelope in this request. A transaction should be an XDR TransactionEnvelope struct encoded using base64. The envelope read from this request is echoed in the `extras.envelope_xdr` field of this response for your convenience.

403.description: Transaction submission has been disabled for Horizon.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

status.description: The HTTP status code for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

extras.description: Additional details that might help the client understand the error(s) that occurred.

value.title: Transaction Submission Disabled
value.detail: Transaction submission has been disabled for Horizon. To enable it again, remove env variable DISABLE_TX_SUB.

409.description: Transaction is a duplicate of a previously submitted transaction.

error_result_xdr.description: TransactionResult XDR string which is present only if the submission status from core is an ERROR.

500.description: Transaction submission failure, exception or invalid status from core.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

status.description: The HTTP status code for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

extras.description: Additional details that might help the client understand the error(s) that occurred.

value.title: Transaction Submission Failed
value.detail: Could not submit transaction to stellar-core. The `extras.error` field on this response contains further details. Descriptions of each code can be found at: https://developers.stellar.org/api/errors/http-status-codes/horizon-specific/transaction-submission-async/transaction_submission_failed

value.title: Transaction Submission Exception
value.detail: Received exception from stellar-core. The `extras.error` field on this response contains further details. Descriptions of each code can be found at: https://developers.stellar.org/api/errors/http-status-codes/horizon-specific/transaction-submission-async/transaction_submission_exception

value.title: Transaction Submission Invalid Status
value.detail: Received invalid status from stellar-core. The `extras.error` field on this response contains further details.  Descriptions of each code can be found at: https://developers.stellar.org/api/errors/http-status-codes/horizon-specific/transaction-submission-async/transaction_submission_invalid_status

503.description: History DB is stale; core is unavailable for transaction submission.

error_result_xdr.description: TransactionResult XDR string which is present only if the submission status from core is an ERROR.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

status.description: The HTTP status code for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

extras.description: Additional details that might help the client understand the error(s) that occurred.

value.title: Historical DB Is Too Stale
value.detail: This horizon instance is configured to reject client requests when it can determine that the history database is lagging too far behind the connected instance of Stellar-Core or read replica. It's also possible that Stellar-Core is out of sync. Please try again later.
